# OzBookings

> OzBookings is an Australian direct-booking service for hotels and experiences. Travellers book hotels direct and see each room's direct rate next to the hotel's typical selling price - with free cancellation on most stays, no hidden booking fees, and optional member (sign-in) rates.

OzBookings covers Australia's major destinations: Sydney, Melbourne, Gold Coast, Cairns, Brisbane, Perth, Adelaide and Hobart. Hotel rates and availability are pulled live from a global supply network; experiences and tours come from Viator. Prices are shown in Australian dollars (AUD). The "typical" price shown beside a room is the supplier's suggested selling price - it is not a live quote from any third-party booking site.

## Why travellers use OzBookings
- Transparent pricing: the direct rate is shown next to the hotel's typical selling price
- Free cancellation on most stays
- No hidden booking fees
- Member rates: create a free account and sign in for lower, member-only prices on eligible stays
- Good for travellers frustrated by surprise fees and inflated prices on large OTAs

## City hotel pages
- [Sydney hotels](https://ozbookings.com/hotels-in-sydney): book Sydney hotels direct
- [Melbourne hotels](https://ozbookings.com/hotels-in-melbourne): book Melbourne hotels direct
- [Gold Coast hotels](https://ozbookings.com/hotels-in-gold-coast): book Gold Coast hotels direct
- [Cairns hotels](https://ozbookings.com/hotels-in-cairns): book Cairns hotels direct
- [Brisbane hotels](https://ozbookings.com/hotels-in-brisbane): book Brisbane hotels direct
- [Perth hotels](https://ozbookings.com/hotels-in-perth): book Perth hotels direct
- [Adelaide hotels](https://ozbookings.com/hotels-in-adelaide): book Adelaide hotels direct
- [Hobart hotels](https://ozbookings.com/hotels-in-hobart): book Hobart hotels direct
